business.name: Capital City Property Service
business.tagline: The handyman Tallahassee trusts with their property

hero.headline: When it needs fixing, *we show up ready*
hero.subheadline: Karl and Brett handle everything from wiring to repairs — the same crew your property manager already calls first.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Property repairs that actually last
services_section.subheading: From electrical work to general maintenance — we handle what property managers and homeowners need done right

services.title: Electrical Installation & Repair
services.description: Wiring, outlets, lighting fixtures, and electrical troubleshooting. We explain what we're doing and why.

services.title: General Property Maintenance
services.description: The repairs and fixes that keep properties running smooth. No job too small, no surprise too big.

services.title: Property Management Support
services.description: Reliable service for rental properties. Tenants love us, property managers trust us.

services.title: Portable Storage Solutions
services.description: Custom electrical work for storage units and portable buildings. We've wired plenty.

about.heading: Karl and Brett — Tallahassee's go-to crew
about.body: We've built our reputation one honest job at a time. Property managers know they can count on us, and homeowners appreciate our straightforward approach. When we say we'll be there, we show up. When we quote a job, that's what you pay. And we always clean up like we were never there.

reviews.name: Lisa S.
reviews.text: Karl is incredibly professional and reliable. He's honest about what needs doing and does excellent work. You won't be disappointed.

reviews.name: J T.
reviews.text: Years of consistent, transparent work. Karl reaches out if something unexpected comes up — no surprises, just honest communication.

reviews.name: Lauer O.
reviews.text: Our property management business relies on CCPS. Karl and Brett are punctual and thorough, and our tenants always praise their work.

reviews.name: Bob W.
reviews.text: Professional and honest electrical work on my portable storage unit. Clean installation, fair pricing.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving the greater Tallahassee area
service_areas.subheading: Quality property service throughout Leon County and surrounding communities

cta.heading: Ready to get it handled right?
cta.body: Call Karl and Brett for honest property service. We'll explain what needs doing and get it done clean.
